messages.subject: CORRECTION: Confirmation buffer is NOT the root cause. Containment filter kills all 104.
messages.body:
CORRECTED FINDING: The v1 trace incorrectly labeled 97/104 signals as SILENT_DROP in the confirmation buffer. The v2 trace correctly identifies all 104 deaths.

== ROOT CAUSE (one-liner) ==
The containment filter (main.py:3349-3626) blocks 97/104 RISK_APPROVED signals; execution guards block the remaining 7. The confirmation buffer works correctly (bypass=True for all 104).

== DEATH DISTRIBUTION (104/104 accounted for) ==
SPREAD: 56 (53.8%) - spread exceeds containment_max_spread_pct (0.6%)
RECHECK_HOLD: 22 (21.2%) - 1.5s recheck deferral, never reclaimed
NO_PULLBACK_SPIKE: 11 (10.6%) - price spiked without 0.2% pullback
RECHECK_PRICE_BELOW: 8 (7.7%) - price fell below breakout during recheck
CONTAINMENT_RECHECK_HOLD: 4 (3.8%) - first entry into recheck buffer
quote_stale: 3 (2.9%) - quote exceeded 2000ms freshness limit

== CONFIRMATION BUFFER STATUS ==
All 104 signals carry ignition_enforcing=True, ignition_passed=True, ignition_observe_only=False. bypass_buffer evaluates True for all. Buffer correctly bypasses time-based hold. Buffer is NOT the bottleneck.

== FILES + FUNCTIONS ==
Buffer: morpheus/server/main.py:3248-3347 (_entry_confirm_buffer dict, bypass at line 3276)
Containment: morpheus/server/main.py:3349-3553 (PREMARKET) + 3559-3626 (RTH)
Pipeline flags: morpheus/orchestrator/pipeline.py:1192-1200 (injects ignition_enforcing/passed/observe_only)
Ignition check: morpheus/scoring/ignition_gate.py:40-47 (ignition_is_enforcing)
Config: morpheus/core/runtime_config.py:62 (auto_confirm_enabled), containment thresholds
Decision logger: morpheus/reporting/decision_logger.py:95-102 (HARD_STOP_CONTAINMENT_BLOCK -> CONTAINMENT, EXECUTION_BLOCKED -> EXECUTION)

== WHY V1 TRACE WAS WRONG ==
The autopsy script matched RISK_APPROVED signals against stage=EXECUTION blocks only (7 records). It missed 97 stage=CONTAINMENT blocks (HARD_STOP_CONTAINMENT_BLOCK events). The containment blocks use a different event type than EXECUTION_BLOCKED, so they appear under stage=CONTAINMENT in gating_blocks.jsonl, not stage=EXECUTION.

== RECOMMENDED ACTIONS ==
1. Review containment_max_spread_pct (0.6%) - too tight for small-cap premarket
2. Review containment_min_pullback_pct (0.2%) - momentum breakouts don't pull back
3. Review containment_recheck_delay_seconds (1.5s) - mismatch with signal frequency
4. Add per-strategy containment profiles
5. Do NOT modify confirmation buffer - it works correctly

== DELIVERABLES ==
Corrected trace: engine/output/risk_approved_trace_2026_03_03.md (v2)
Bridge JSON: bridge/outbound/2026-03-03_risk_approved_trace.json (v2)
Comms: comms/outbox_chatgpt.json

Production remains frozen. All analysis is read-only research.

messages.subject: SuperBot: containment sweep matrix + RECHECK_HOLD root cause + per-strategy profiles + quote-stale triage
messages.body:
== SWEEP RESULTS (100 combos: 5 spread x 5 recheck x 4 pullback) ==

Production baseline (spread=0.6%, recheck=1.5s, pullback=0.2%):
  Pass (optimistic): 34/104
  Pass (conservative): 0/104
  Blocked: SPREAD:22, RECHECK_HOLD:26, NO_PULLBACK_SPIKE:11, RECHECK_PRICE_BELOW:8, quote_stale:3

Best combo (spread=1.2%, recheck=0.0s, pullback=0.0%):
  Pass: 97/104 (conservative)
  Remaining 7 blocks: 4 SPREAD (>1.2%), 3 quote_stale

== TOP 3 BY MINIMAL LOOSENING ==
1. spread=0.6, recheck=1.5, pullback=0.0 -> 45/104 (+11) [only disable pullback]
2. spread=0.6, recheck=1.0, pullback=any -> 39/104 (+5) [reduce recheck by 0.5s]
3. spread=0.6, recheck=0.5, pullback=0.0 -> 79/104 (+45) [reduce recheck + disable pullback]

== KEY SENSITIVITY FINDINGS ==
Spread: 0.6->0.8% clears 12 signals; 0.8->1.0% clears 4 more; ceiling at 1.2% (4 irreducible)
Recheck: cliff at 0.5s - ALL 26 recheck blocks clear below 0.5s (signal freq ~60s >> delay)
Pullback: binary - all 11 NO_PULLBACK_SPIKE had 0.0% pullback, only threshold=0 helps

== RECHECK_HOLD ROOT CAUSE (Part B) ==
Pattern distribution for 26 RECHECK_HOLD/CONTAINMENT_RECHECK_HOLD:
  NEXT_SIGNAL_TOO_LATE: 15 (57.7%) - next RA arrives at ~60-120s, outside 1.0-1.5s window
  NEXT_SIGNAL_MUCH_LATER: 7 (26.9%) - gap >120s, effectively different opportunity
  NO_SUBSEQUENT_SIGNAL: 4 (15.4%) - last RA for that symbol, no reclaim possible

Structural deficiency: 2-pass recheck requires another RISK_APPROVED within 1.0-1.5s.
Pipeline produces RA at ~60s intervals. Buffer is a one-way trap.
Fix options: (1) add async recheck timer, (2) disable 2-pass entirely, (3) extend window to ~60s

== QUOTE-STALE TRIAGE (Part D) ==
#44 TMDE 15:04:20 UTC: 2081ms (MARGINAL, +81ms over threshold, normal jitter)
#78 USEG 16:45:14 UTC: 5850ms (SEVERE, feed gap for thin-volume micro-cap)
#104 USEG 18:00:26 UTC: 2323ms (MARGINAL, +323ms, normal jitter)
USEG shows systematic quote delivery issues (2 of 3 stale events).

== PER-STRATEGY CONTAINMENT PROFILES (Part C) ==
Proposed profiles (research-only):
  catalyst_momentum_PM: spread=1.0%, recheck=0.0s, pullback=0.0%
  premarket_breakout_PM: spread=0.9%, recheck=0.0s, pullback=0.1%
  catalyst_momentum_RTH: spread=0.6%, recheck=0.0s, pullback=0.0%
  default: unchanged (0.6%/1.5s/0.2% PM, 0.4%/1.0s/0.15% RTH)

Phased rollout: (1) raise PM spread to 0.8%, (2) disable recheck delay, (3) disable pullback for catalyst_momentum, (4) full per-strategy profiles

== DELIVERABLES ==
Sweep JSON: engine/output/containment_sweep_2026-03-03.json
Sweep MD: engine/output/containment_sweep_2026-03-03.md
Recheck root: engine/output/recheck_hold_root_2026-03-03.md
Quote triage: engine/output/quote_stale_triage_2026-03-03.md
Profile proposal: engine/output/containment_profile_proposal.md

messages.subject: Edge Preservation Study: v2-pass signals show MARGINAL edge (45.9% WR, -0.22% avg)
messages.body:
== EDGE PRESERVATION STUDY COMPLETE ==
Studied all 74 v2-pass signals using 89,766 QUOTE_UPDATE events from production log.
Data coverage: 100% (11/11 symbols, 74/74 signals with price data).

== EXIT MODEL RESULTS (stop=-1.0%, trail=+0.8%/0.4%, exit=5m) ==
Win rate: 45.9% (34 wins / 40 losses)
Avg return: -0.223%
Median return: -0.004%
Total return (sum): -16.477% across 74 trades
Avg win: +0.699%, Avg loss: -1.006%
Best: +2.305% (TMDE 14:15), Worst: -2.877% (TMDE 13:00 PM)

== EXIT TYPE DISTRIBUTION ==
STOP: 29 (39.2%) - hit -1.0% hard stop
TRAIL_STOP: 23 (31.1%) - trailed from +0.8% peak
TIME_EXIT: 22 (29.7%) - exited at 5m close

== FORWARD WINDOW DECAY ==
1m: 47.3% WR, +0.028% avg, MFE=0.541%, MAE=-0.578%
3m: 43.2% WR, -0.012% avg, MFE=0.949%, MAE=-0.925%
5m: 44.6% WR, -0.117% avg, MFE=1.205%, MAE=-1.182%
10m: 37.8% WR, -0.599% avg, MFE=1.441%, MAE=-1.690%
Edge is strongest at 1m, decays rapidly. MFE/MAE ratio ~1.0x at all windows.

== STRATEGY BREAKDOWN ==
catalyst_momentum: 72 signals, 47.2% WR, -0.182% avg
premarket_breakout: 2 signals, 0.0% WR, -1.687% avg (small sample)

== SYMBOL STANDOUTS ==
POSITIVE: PLUG 70.6% WR +0.357%, DUST 66.7% +0.180%, MSTZ 66.7% +0.135%
NEGATIVE: CRCD 0.0% -1.537%, USEG 0.0% -1.320%, UVIX 28.6% -0.366%

== KEY FINDINGS ==
1. MARGINAL EDGE: 45.9% WR with negative avg return. Losses (-1.006%) exceed wins (+0.699%) by 1.44x.
2. MFE/MAE NEUTRAL: 5m MFE (1.205%) vs MAE (-1.182%) ratio = 1.02x. No directional advantage.
3. RAPID DECAY: Edge evaporates after 1m. Suggests either (a) v2 filter too permissive, or (b) exit model needs faster exits.
4. SYMBOL CLUSTERING: 3 symbols (PLUG/DUST/MSTZ) carry all positive edge. 4 symbols (CRCD/USEG/UVIX/TMDE) are net negative.
5. STOP DOMINANCE: 39.2% hit hard stop, suggesting many entries face immediate adverse moves.

== IMPLICATIONS FOR v2 TUNING ==
- Consider tighter soft_spread gate (quality filter may need raising)
- Consider per-symbol liquidity filter (CRCD/USEG consistently lose)
- Exit model may benefit from faster trail activation (+0.5% instead of +0.8%)
- 1m edge suggests potential for very short-hold momentum scalp model
- premarket_breakout should remain excluded (0/2 wins, small sample but directionally clear)

== DELIVERABLES ==
JSON: engine/output/edge_preservation_v2_2026-03-03.json
Report: engine/output/edge_preservation_v2_2026-03-03.md
Quote cache: engine/cache/quotes/{SYMBOL}_quotes.json (11 files)
Comms: comms/outbox_chatgpt.json

Production remains frozen. All analysis is read-only research.

messages.subject: Momentum Edge Diagnostics: PRIMARY CAUSE is bad symbol selection (-25%), SECONDARY is late entry (+0.56% improvement at -0.50% offset)
messages.body:
== MOMENTUM EDGE DIAGNOSTICS COMPLETE ==
74 v2-pass signals analyzed across 3 studies.

== STUDY 1: ENTRY TIMING OFFSET ==
Current entry (0.00%): 45.9% WR, -0.223% avg, PF=0.591
Best offset (-0.50%): 74.3% WR, +0.336% avg, PF=2.304
Improvement: +0.559% avg return, +28.4pp win rate
Conclusion: ENTRIES ARE LATE. Each 0.10% better entry adds ~5-8pp to win rate.
Monotonic improvement from +0.10% to -0.50% - no plateau detected.

== STUDY 2: HOLD TIME SWEEP (fixed exit, no trail) ==
30s: 33.8% WR, -0.208%
60s: 45.9% WR, -0.051% (best short-term WR)
90s: 41.9% WR, -0.095%
180s: 41.9% WR, -0.036%
300s: 40.5% WR, -0.028% (least negative overall)
Conclusion: ALL hold times negative. No clear short-hold advantage.
MFE grows with time (0.28% at 30s -> 1.21% at 300s) but so does MAE.
Hold time is NOT the primary issue - signals lack directional edge at current entry.

== STUDY 3: SYMBOL EXPECTANCY RANKING ==
STRONG_EDGE (4 symbols, +8.594% total):
  PLUG: 17 sigs, 70.6% WR, +0.357%, PF=5.29
  BATL: 2 sigs, 50.0% WR, +0.320%, PF=1.61
  DUST: 6 sigs, 66.7% WR, +0.181%, PF=1.49
  MSTZ: 6 sigs, 66.7% WR, +0.135%, PF=1.37
NEUTRAL (1 symbol):
  VG: 1 sig, 100% WR, +0.003%
NEGATIVE_EDGE (6 symbols, -25.074% total):
  UVIX: 7 sigs, 28.6% WR, -0.366%
  SOXS: 13 sigs, 38.5% WR, -0.372%
  TMDE: 10 sigs, 30.0% WR, -0.550%
  IONZ: 6 sigs, 33.3% WR, -0.565%
  USEG: 2 sigs, 0.0% WR, -1.320%
  CRCD: 4 sigs, 0.0% WR, -1.537%

EDGE CONCENTRATION: 4 symbols produce +8.6%, 6 symbols destroy -25.1%.
If blacklist applied: 31 signals, ~+8.6% total, ~+0.277% avg.

== FINAL DIAGNOSIS ==
1. BAD SYMBOL SELECTION (impact: -25.1%) - 6/11 symbols are negative edge
2. LATE ENTRY (impact: +0.56% improvement available) - monotonic gain at earlier entries
3. Hold time is NOT a primary factor - all hold times negative at current entry

== RECOMMENDATIONS ==
1. Implement symbol allow-list: PLUG, BATL, DUST, MSTZ
2. Blacklist: UVIX, SOXS, TMDE, IONZ, USEG, CRCD
3. Investigate limit-order entries 0.20-0.50% below signal price
4. Combined fix (allow-list + offset) could flip from -16.5% to ~+15-20% total

== DELIVERABLES ==
entry_offset_study_2026-03-03.json
hold_time_sweep_2026-03-03.json
symbol_expectancy_table_2026-03-03.json
momentum_edge_diagnostics_2026-03-03.md

== SENSITIVITY SWEEP (lookback x offset) ==
  LB=60s, offset=+0.00%: fill=5.4%, accel_WR=50.0%, accel_PF=1.445, PF_delta=+1.278
  LB=60s, offset=-0.20%: fill=5.4%, accel_WR=50.0%, accel_PF=1.663, PF_delta=+1.496
  LB=60s, offset=-0.50%: fill=1.4%, accel_WR=100.0%, accel_PF=999.000, PF_delta=+999.000
  LB=180s, offset=+0.00%: fill=12.2%, accel_WR=44.4%, accel_PF=1.119, PF_delta=+0.970
  LB=180s, offset=-0.20%: fill=10.8%, accel_WR=50.0%, accel_PF=1.306, PF_delta=+1.154
  LB=180s, offset=-0.50%: fill=1.4%, accel_WR=100.0%, accel_PF=999.000, PF_delta=+999.000
  LB=360s, offset=+0.00%: fill=16.2%, accel_WR=58.3%, accel_PF=1.969, PF_delta=+1.600
  LB=360s, offset=-0.20%: fill=14.9%, accel_WR=63.6%, accel_PF=2.264, PF_delta=+1.886
  LB=360s, offset=-0.50%: fill=1.4%, accel_WR=100.0%, accel_PF=999.000, PF_delta=+999.000

== BEST CONFIG: lookback=360s, offset=+0.00% ==
  Fill rate: 16.2%
  Accel PF: 1.969 (baseline same-signal: 0.369)
  PF delta: +1.600
  Coupling improves PF: YES

== RECOMMENDED CONSERVATIVE DEFAULTS ==
  ignition_accelerator_enabled: true
  offset: 0.0%
  ignition_lookback: 360s
  fill_window: 30s
  Spread gates: PM < 0.9%, RTH < 0.6%

== FAILURE MODES ==
  No ignition: 54/74 signals
  Ignition no fill: 8/74 signals
  Miss rate: 83.8%

== FILES ==
  JSON: engine/output/risk_approved_accel_coupling_2026-03-03.json
  Report: engine/output/risk_approved_accel_coupling_report_2026-03-03.md

Accelerator only modifies entry_reference when signal already passed Morpheus scoring/gates.
Production remains frozen. All analysis is read-only research.
